arts.ttl: Nagelsmann confirms plan to rotate heavily against Hungary
arts.sum: Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann has confirmed his intention to make several changes against Hungary.

arts.ttl: Kleindienst on hopes of going to the World Cup with Germany: "Still a long way to go"
arts.sum: Despite impressing for Germany recently, Tim Kleindienst says he still has "a long way to go" to secure a place in the World Cup squad.

Germany round off what has been a successful UEFA Nations League campaign with a trip to Hungary on Tuesday evening. The away side were 7-0 winners over Bosnia and Herzegovina on the weekend, and sit...

arts.ttl: Löw reveals how he persuaded Musiala to play for Germany instead of England
arts.sum: Joachim Löw has reflected on the work he did to convince Jamal Musiala to play for Germany rather than England.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich to be held out of Germany’s next match
arts.sum: So Germany and Bayern fans must have winced when, after a scary-looking injury situation forced Kimmich off the field Saturday in Germany’s 7-0 Nations League win over Bosnia and Herzegovina, the midfielder (playing as right-back for the national team) immediately said that he wanted to go again in the next match. And a great time for Kimmich to rest and recuperate.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Florian Wirtz: the complete midfielder
arts.sum: Playmaker Florian Wirtz grabs plenty of headlines as he racks up the goals and assists for Bayer Leverkusen, but the Germany international isn't afraid to do the hard work - and it's reflected in several league-high statistics. The playmaker racked up an impressive 11 goals and 11 assists in 32 league appearances in 2023/24, helping Die Werkself to go unbeaten domestically in a season that saw them lift the club's first-ever Bundesliga title.

arts.ttl: Hungary vs. Germany preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Nations League clash between Hungary and Germany, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Hungary coach thankful for support after collapse
arts.sum: Hungary assistant coach Adam Szalai said he was fine after collapsing and being rushed to hospital minutes after the start of his country's Nations League tie against the Netherlands in Amsterdam on Saturday.
